text:
Created attachment 191464
poudriere log of py-graphite-web

Attached is my poudriere log. It basically tries to install django111 when django18 is already installed in the build-jail because py27-django-tagging depends on django111 and not on django18.

I don't see a way to force www/py-django-tagging to use django18 as dependency. I don't even know exactly which port to blame for this.
